hero.title: Rest under the open sky
hero.subtitle: Unique glamping domes by Lake Mikytai. Planetarium shows, sauna, sports courts and unforgettable nature experience.

accommodation.title: Our domes
accommodation.subtitle: 4 unique glamping domes surrounded by nature. Currently 1 dome is open, others are being prepared.

sports.title: Beach sports courts

location.title: How to get here
location.subtitle: Star Houses are located by Lake Mikytai, Sakiai district

footer.description: Unique glamping domes by Lake Mikytai. Planetarium, sauna, sports and nature tranquility in one place.
